llm.purpose: Generates and refines cooking recipes in chat

secrets.description: Brave Search API key (api.search.brave.com) for the assistant's web_search tool. Optional — falls back to DuckDuckGo scraping when unset.
Optional direct Anthropic API key, used only when the platform LLM proxy is unavailable (staging/standalone). Leave unset to rely on the platform proxy.
Claude model id used for recipe chat
Enable extended thinking for recipe generation (true/false)
Daily chat message limit per user
Server log level (DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR)
